title: Nutritious coffee product
abstract: The subject matter discloses a food composition for preparing a coffee beverage, comprising ground coffee and sesame composition present at least 5% by weight of the food composition, wherein the sesame composition is mixed with the ground coffee. The subject matter also discloses a capsule filled with the food composition and a method of preparing a coffee beverage using the food composition.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A food composition for preparing a coffee beverage, comprising: ground coffee; sesame composition present at least 5% by weight of the food composition, wherein the sesame composition is mixed with the ground coffee. 2. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the food composition is contained in a capsule. 3. The composition according to claim 1 , wherein the food composition is contained in a bulk. 4. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition underwent water- based extraction prior to mixing with the ground coffee. 5. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition comprises sesame husks. 6. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition comprises sesame husk and sesame seeds. 7. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition is present at least 15% by weight of the food composition. 8. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition is present at least 20% by weight of the food composition. 9. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition is present at least 30% by weight of the food composition. 10. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition is present at least 40% by weight of the food composition. 11. The composition according to claim 1, wherein the sesame composition is present at least 50% by weight of the food composition. 12. A process for preparing a coffee beverage using a coffee capsule containing sesame husks present at about 5% by weight of the food composition and brewing coffee from the coffee capsule at a coffee preparation machine. 13. A coffee capsule for producing coffee in a coffee machine, comprising: a housing; food composition contained in the housing, said food composition comprising ground coffee and sesame husks present at least 5% by weight of the food composition. 11
